css: .trip-log{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Inter',sans-serif;color:#222;}.trip-log h1{font-size:22px;margin:0 0 4px 0;letter-spacing:-0.3px;}.trip-log .sub{color:#666;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:18px;}.trip-log table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:6px 0 14px 0;}.trip-log td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;font-size:13px;}.trip-log td.lbl{color:#888;width:30%;}.trip-log .kpi-row{display:flex;gap:12px;margin:14px 0;}.trip-log .kpi{flex:1;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;}.trip-log .kpi .v{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;}.trip-log .kpi .l{font-size:11px;color:#777;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;}.trip-log .stamp{margin-top:24px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}.trip-log .stamp .box{width:45%;border-top:1px solid #999;padding-top:4px;font-size:11px;color:#666;}
html:
Trip Log — {{ doc.name }}

Status: {{ doc.status }} · Recorded {{ doc.modified.strftime('%d %b %Y') }}
{{ '{:,.0f}'.format(doc.distance_km or 0) }} km
Distance
{{ doc.start_odo or 0 }} → {{ doc.end_odo or 0 }}
Odometer
{{ ((doc.end_datetime - doc.start_datetime).total_seconds() / 3600)|round(1) if doc.end_datetime else '—' }} hr
Duration
{% if doc.remarks %}{% endif %}
Vehicle{{ doc.vehicle }} {{ frappe.db.get_value('Vehicle', doc.vehicle, 'make') }} {{ frappe.db.get_value('Vehicle', doc.vehicle, 'model') }}
Driver{{ frappe.db.get_value('Driver', doc.driver, 'full_name') }} ({{ doc.driver }})
Purpose{{ doc.purpose or '—' }}
Start{{ doc.start_datetime.strftime('%d %b %Y, %I:%M %p') if doc.start_datetime else '—' }}
End{{ doc.end_datetime.strftime('%d %b %Y, %I:%M %p') if doc.end_datetime else '—' }}
Remarks{{ doc.remarks }}
Driver signature
Fleet Manager signature
name: Trip Log
